title: fix(1796): add try/catch + forgeDebug to labels.ts and pull-requests.ts
body:
## Summary

Wraps all 12 API-facing functions in labels.ts and pull-requests.ts with try/catch + forgeDebug error logging, matching the established pattern in schedules/manager.ts.

### Files changed

github/ops/labels.ts — 6 functions wrapped:
- listLabels, createLabel, updateLabel, deleteLabel, addIssueLabels, removeIssueLabels

github/ops/pull-requests.ts — 6 functions wrapped:
- listPullRequests, createPullRequest, getPullRequest, listPullRequestComments, updatePullRequest, mergePullRequest

### Pattern applied

Each function follows the same pattern:
} catch (error) {
  forgeDebug({
    scope: 'github-ops',
    level: 'error',
    message: `{functionName} failed: ${error message}`,
    context: { agentId, repositoryName, owner, ... },
  });
  throw error;
}

### Bug fix included

removeIssueLabels had two bugs:
1. Used response.data.map(...) but DELETE returns empty body — .map() threw
2. Passed labels: string[] instead of GitHub API's required labels: "wontfix,bug" (comma-separated string)


Both fixed. All 88 existing ops tests pass.
Fixes #1796.
head: fix/1796-github-ops-errordown
